scripts.setup: Instructions for setting up your portfolio

steps.title: Add Your Professional Photo
steps.action: Download your photo from LinkedIn and save it to /public/images/profile-photo.jpg

steps.title: Update Contact Information
steps.action: Add your real email and phone number

steps.title: Verify LinkedIn Data
steps.action: Cross-check all experience and project details with your LinkedIn profile

steps.title: Add Project Screenshots
steps.action: Take screenshots of your projects and add them to /public/images/projects/

steps.title: Test Everything
steps.action: Click all links, test forms, and verify animations work smoothly

dataFiles.personal.json: Personal info, social links, rotating titles
dataFiles.projects.json: All your projects with technologies and links
dataFiles.skills.json: Skills organized by categories with proficiency levels
